message:
🌱 Add kagent: [FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models mission (#1071)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kagent-183-feature-add-support-for-aws-bedrock-models",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kagent: [FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models",
+    "description": "[FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kagent deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kagent version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent
helm list -n kagent 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kagent installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kagent configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kagent configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent
kubectl get configmap -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kagent
```
I am interested to use with Claude Sonnet 3.7, DeepSeek, and/or Amazon Nova."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models",
+        "description": "Example `ModelConfig` usage:

```yaml
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret:
```yaml
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret: aws-bedrock-credentials
  
  bedrock:
    region: us-east-1
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade kagent to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kagent:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade kagent kagent/kagent --namespace kagent
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kagent
helm list -n kagent
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kagent -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kagent
kubectl get events -n kagent --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[FEATURE] Add support for AWS Bedrock models" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Example `ModelConfig` usage:

```yaml
apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret: aws-bedrock-credentials
  
  bedrock:
    region: us-east-1
```

Requires setting credentials for aws in",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: kagent.dev/v1alpha2
kind: ModelConfig
metadata:
  name: bedrock-claude
  namespace: kagent
spec:
// any valid model ID from aws bedrock will work
  model: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
  provider: Bedrock
  
  apiKeySecret: aws-bedrock-credentials
  
  bedrock:
    region: us-east-1",
+        "kubectl create secret generic aws-bedrock-credentials \
  --namespace kagent \
  --from-literal=AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=<access-key> \
  --from-literal=AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=<secret-key>",
+        "Error code: 404 - {'error': {'message': "The model doesn't exist or doesn't support this API. Retry your request with a different model ID.", 'type': 'not_found_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'model_not_found'}}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "feature"
+    ],
